news.t: Calamos Continues ETF Expansion with the Launch of the Calamos Alternative Nasdaq & Bond ETF (Ticker: CANQ)

overview.description: The Calamos Nasdaq Equity & Income ETF (CANQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is actively managed to provide convertible security-like exposure to the NASDAQ-100 Index. The portfolio contains a mix of equity options and fixed income exposure to pursue favorable risk-adjusted returns CANQ was launched on Feb 13, 2024 and is issued by Calamos.
